title: Towards autonomous medical artificial intelligence agents
abstract: Towards autonomous medical artificial intelligence agents simplifies AI automation by letting you describe workflows in natural language and then executing them step by step. Ideal for teams with more...
abstract_zh: 有啥效率低下的时候别急着吐槽自己，试试 **Towards autonomous medical artificial intelligence agents** 吧！写周报时，它能帮你智能整理数据；调Bug时，它会默默测试验证，让你的代码更稳当。这不仅仅是个工具，简直是你的私人AI助手，让工作变得轻松又高效！
